title: 1H-NMR Metabolomics as a Tool for Winemaking Monitoring.
author: Le Mao I Martin-Pernier J Bautista C Lacampagne S Richard T Da Costa G
content: S-EPMC8621607 PMC8621607 1H-NMR Metabolomics as a Tool for Winemaking Monitoring. The chemical composition of wine is known to be influenced by multiple factors including some viticulture practices and winemaking processes. 1H-NMR metabolomics has been successfully applied to the study of wine
